operations.title: Search intelligence
operations.description: Search cited TNL intelligence with bounded filters and cursor pagination.

operations.title: Get intelligence item
operations.description: Retrieve one stable TNL intelligence item and its revision metadata.

operations.title: List recent changes
operations.description: List published, revised, or retracted intelligence since an explicit timestamp.

operations.title: Get entity or asset exposure
operations.description: Retrieve structured stories and impact paths for an entity, asset, or impact path.

operations.title: Run research skill
operations.description: Run one evidence-first TNL Bot research workflow with citations and an as-of boundary.

operations.title: Get research result
operations.description: Retrieve a previously started research result by stable result ID.

operations.title: Get weekly consequential edition
operations.description: Retrieve the cited weekly consequential-development edition.

verification.n8n: compiled action runtime plus signed-trigger event catalog
verification.pipedream: action/source modules present and imported by platform tests
